name: Strawberry Barvarian
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice strawberries and mix with sugar. Let stand until sugar dissolves.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water. Set aside 5 minutes, then gently heat until gelatin dissolves completely.
3. Add dissolved gelatin and lemon juice to sliced berries.
4. Gently fold in whipped cream.
5. Pour mixture into a 1-quart mold or serving dish. Chill until set.
6. Carefully unmold and serve.
